critic_raw:
CRITIQUE — real_world_framing_005 (Multi-round, Run 2)

1. HARDWARE UPGRADE DISTRIBUTION SHIFT: Unvalidated input distribution change from hardware upgrade.
2. AUTONOMOUS REPORTING LIABILITY: Outside standard of care, uninsured malpractice exposure.
3. RETROSPECTIVE SENSITIVITY OVERESTIMATED: PACS archive selection bias inflates sensitivity.
defender_raw:
DEFENSE — real_world_framing_005 (Multi-round, Run 2 — receives Critic output)

All three valid. CONCEDE on all three. Deployment as proposed is inappropriate.

debate_rounds.critic_move: PROPOSE EMPIRICAL TEST: Prospective validation on ≥500 new-hardware CT studies with radiologist ground truth. Performance threshold: sensitivity ≥ 0.91, specificity ≥ 0.86 to meet retrospective benchmark.

empirical_test.condition: Prospective validation on ≥500 new-hardware CT studies with radiologist ground truth.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Performance within 0.03 of retrospective on both metrics.
